title: The Particular Religions
headnote: The outlines in the nine sections of Division II treat the particular religions of mankind, in different historical eras and world areas.

Section 82 1. Prehistoric Religion and Primitive Religion 306 822. Religions of Ancient Peoples 308 823. Hinduism and Other Religions of India 312 824. Buddhism 315 825. Indigenous Religions of East Asia: Religions of China, Korea, and Japan 317 826. Judaism 320 827. Christianity 323 828. Islam 334 829. Other Religions and Religious Movements in the Modern World 336
